svg.title: Enclosure Back Panel - Orthographic Drawing
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the enclosure back panel. Scale: 1.35 px/mm (front, top), side detail at 8 px/mm. Coordinate system: X=width (0-220mm), Y=depth (0-4mm), Z=height (0-400mm). Origin at exterior front-bottom-left. Front view (looking along -Y): X horizontal, Z vertical. Side view (looking along -X): Y horizontal, Z vertical. Top view (looking along -Z): X horizontal, Y vertical.
svg.text: Material: ABS or ASA (3D printed) | Envelope: 220W x 4D x 400H mm | Scale noted per view

g.text: Scale 8:1 | Side section thru JG hole

svg.text: 1. All dimensions in mm. Tolerances: holes ±0.2mm, cutout ±0.3mm, overall ±0.5mm.
2. Material: ABS or ASA, 3D printed. Wall thickness 4mm. Color: dark (to match enclosure).
3. Lower zone (3x): ⌀15.9mm thru for JG PP1208W bulkhead fittings. 30mm interior clearance per fitting.
4. Mid zone (2x): ⌀12.5mm thru for PG7 cable glands (flavor line exit). 15mm interior clearance per gland.
5. Upper zone (1x): IEC C14 panel-mount inlet, 27.4 x 19.8mm rectangular cutout with 2x M3 mounting holes at 40mm c-t-c. 25mm interior clearance.
6. Color-coded rings and embossed labels at each fitting position per assembly drawing.
7. Panel may be integral to enclosure body or removable (fastener details per enclosure assembly).
